channel.title: Blogdown on Yongfu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blogdown on Yongfu's Blog

item.title: Customizing Hugo / Blogdown RSS Templates
item.description: Blogdown makes it easy to create Hugo blogs or personal websites, and it is becoming more and more popular in the R community. Once the blog is created, people might want to submit their blogs’ RSS feeds to R-bloggers. But before that can happen, one must modify the RSS template to meet the requirements of RSS submission.
